@graph.name: CS Services in Tamil Nadu | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: CS Services in Tamil Nadu. From ₹5,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board res. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is included in annual ROC filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

mainEntity.name: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide cs services services in Tamil Nadu?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Tamil Nadu from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Tamil Nadu?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Tamil Nadu fall under ROC Chennai. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Tamil Nadu-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Tamil Nadu?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Tamil Nadu: 0.15% on authorised capital (max ₹25L). Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
